title: Admin Update Releases Response
description: Core versions published in the official registry (newest first) for the admin update version picker (mirrors @selfhelp/shared IUpdateReleases). available=false means the registry could not be reached and the UI falls back to manual version entry.

available.description: Whether the registry index could be reached.

current_version.description: The core version this instance currently runs.

blocked.description: Whether the registry marks this release as blocked (e.g. by a security advisory).
